compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement github-bootstrap.sh bootstrap script
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/github-bootstrap.sh to make RED tests pass.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/github-bootstrap.sh (executable)

## Acceptance Criteria
- gh absent from PATH: exits 0 (fail-open), warning emitted
- --dry-run flag: proxied to provision-ruleset.sh, exits 0, no API calls
- --repo owner/repo: uses explicit repo instead of auto-detecting
- gh present + auth ok: git push origin HEAD:main (idempotent), then provision-ruleset.sh --non-interactive
- git push fails: logs warning, skips provision, exits 0 (fail-open)
- provision-ruleset.sh unavailable: logs warning, exits 0

## File Path Constraints
Use SCRIPT_DIR via BASH_SOURCE for locating provision-ruleset.sh (at $SCRIPT_DIR/provision-ruleset.sh). Never hardcode paths.

## Dependencies
Create after cbb1-4a6e (RED tests). Tests should be RED before this task starts.

## Testing Mode
testing_mode: GREEN
